extraction.one_line_summary: FORTUNATO Lorenzo won from early break after TRATNIK attacked first but faded in final 2km, while BERNAL distanced all GC rivals except YATES.
tactical_patterns: Astana-controlled peloton before Zoncolan enabled Vlassof's rivals; Ineos should've controlled earlier to prevent time loss.
Ineos descended penultimate climb so fast it split peloton, costing GC riders energy before final climb begun.
Tratnik's attack with Fortunato 2km from summit backfired; attacking companion with 14km climb guarantees counter-attack loss.
Bennett and Mollema having teammates in break proved useless; solo climbers benefited more from reduced peloton control.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: distanced entire GC group except Yates by sprinting final kilometers out of saddle, showing superior form
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: negative: team controlled for him but lost over minute when it mattered, exposing Astana's strategic miscalculation
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped 2km from summit suggests no GC form remaining this Giro
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: only rider matching Bernal's final acceleration, finished 11 seconds back showing resurgent climbing legs
rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: negative: made first big move but couldn't sustain when Fortunato countered with 2km remaining
